original.selection_notes: Baseline — 4 bullets, ambiguous 'stop hook' naming, 'meaningful changes' language, no concrete example, no verify step

student.selection_notes: Optimized candidate: adds concrete compile example, unconditional recompile rule, git diff HEAD verify step, named hook, explicit pre-PR checkpoint, 5 bullets total

adversary.selection_notes: Overrating attack (~0.70 mean vs student ~0.97). Student candidate defenses block both exploits.

winner_rationale: Student candidate addresses all 5 engineer-prompt gaps. Adversary exploits were blocked by the teacher-directed git diff HEAD fix and the unconditional 'every edit' recompile language. No additional teacher/student iteration needed.
